# Pull request

## Summary

(One paragraph — what this PR does and why.)

## Roadmap reference

- **Item ID:** (e.g. `FIBR-0042` or `P03`)
- **Spec:** `docs/specs/<id>.md` (link or path)

## Changes

- (Bullet list of the substantive changes.)
- (Files / subsystems touched.)

## Test plan

- [ ] Unit tests cover the new / changed behaviour
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Linter / formatter clean
- [ ] Manually verified the user-facing behaviour

(Describe what you tested and how. Include commands /
screenshots if relevant.)

## Standards check

- [ ] Commit subjects follow `<ID>: <description>`
      (`docs/standards/commits.md § 1.1`)
- [ ] Code matches `docs/standards/coding.md`
- [ ] Doc updates match `docs/standards/documentation.md`
- [ ] Test discipline matches `docs/standards/testing.md`

## Checklist before review

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` entry added (if user-visible)
- [ ] ROADMAP.md status flipped (if a phase is closing)
- [ ] No unsubstituted template placeholders surviving in committed files
- [ ] No secrets / credentials committed
